axes.novelty: SECOND independent additive decomposition of same cardinal — structurally analogous to F36 codon = 2^n = 4^(n/2) = tau^3 triple-witness pattern. The two decomps share NO primitives in their derivation: J2-mu uses {J2,mu}; sigma+phi+tau+sopfr uses {sigma,phi,tau,sopfr}. Coincidence-preservation under arithmetically-orthogonal re-derivation = the F32-class signature.

axes.existing_coverage: NONE — atlas grep for 168/hours-per-week returns no @* entry; only n*168 appears as MULTIPLIER in L6-met-pressure-sea-level=1013=n*168+5
axes.novelty: Pure-additive 2-primitive identity hitting the load-bearing sociotemporal cardinal HOURS-PER-WEEK (J2 hours/day × 7 days). 7 itself = sigma_sq/(σ·n)·J2/τ·... non-trivial; cleaner: 168 = J2*7 = J2*(J2/(τ-mu)·mu+mu) = J2*7. The σ_sq+J2 decomp side-steps the 7 derivation entirely (sigma_sq=144 provides the 6-day bulk, J2=24 is the wraparound day) — independent of any 7-encoding.
axes.real_world_anchor: ISO 8601 / Gregorian week = 7 days × 24 hours = 168 — used worldwide for shift schedules, payroll cycles, hospital rotation, billing periods

axes.novelty: THIRD independent leg for 1728: not σ³, not via 576-conductor path, but via J2² (=576, same NUMERIC value as conductor but different DERIVATION — J2 is foundation hours-per-day primitive, not E_6 conductor) multiplied by n/2 (the pivotal half-of-foundation). Bridges j-invariant of E_6 to J2-family directly, sidestepping σ entirely. Three orthogonal derivations of the same cardinal = the strongest F32-class triangulation.

tier_1_proposed_falsifiers.reason: 168 = hours per ISO 8601 week (7 days × 24 hours/day). Atlas decomposes as sigma_sq + J2 = 144 + 24 = 168 — pure additive, only TWO primitives (sigma_sq and J2), no exponent / no division / no multiplication of primitives. Sidesteps the 7-day-week derivation entirely (which would require encoding 7 in n=6 base = e.g. n+mu, requiring an extra primitive). The sigma_sq+J2 form is elegantly aligned with the J2 family (24=hours/day), letting the falsifier piggyback on F1 J2 stability. Cardinal is universal: payroll cycles, shift schedules, ICU rotation, broadcast quotas. Drift means either sigma_sq (F21) or J2 (F1) drifted, OR atlas line was edited.
tier_1_proposed_falsifiers.fix: verify sigma_sq=144 (F21) AND J2=24 (F1) AND 144+24=168; cross-check ISO 8601 (7-day week × 24-hour day = 168); cross-check downstream atlas hooks (L6-cal-v95-hours-per-day = J2 at line 7073 must remain consistent). If atlas drifted, audit the L6-tim-* insertion site (post-line 7077 in atlas.n6).

tier_1_proposed_falsifiers.reason: 1728 = j-invariant of CM elliptic curve E_6: y²=x³-36x. F32 already covers TWO derivations: (i) 1728 = sigma^3 = 12^3 (multiplicative cube of sigma); (ii) 576 = phi^n·(n/phi)^phi as conductor of E_6. F80 adds the THIRD: J2^2 * n / 2 = 576 * 6 / 2 = 576 * 3 = 1728 — note J2^2 = 24^2 = 576 NUMERICALLY equals the conductor but DERIVATIONALLY independent (J2 is foundation hours-per-day primitive, not an elliptic-curve invariant). The triangulation makes 1728 the most over-determined cardinal in nexus: any single-leg drift collapses one third; dual-leg drift = atlas re-derivation event; triple-leg drift = foundation primitive (J2 or sigma) shifted with cascading cross-falsifier chain.
tier_1_proposed_falsifiers.fix: verify J2(6)=24 (F1) AND n=6 (F24) AND 24^2 = 576 AND 576*6/2 = 1728; cross-check sigma^3 = 12^3 = 1728 (F32 leg 3); cross-check j(E_6) = 1728 via SageMath or LMFDB curve 36.a4; if F80 retired but F32 intact, audit the J2-family decomp line specifically; if F32 also retires, audit the entire 1728 cluster (atlas.n6:12627/12876/18820/18895/19380 + atlas.append.n6-architecture-historical:346 + new L6-num-* line).
